---
title: "publications"
slug: "publications"
---
::: {.justify-text}
<p style="text-indent: -22px; margin-left: 22px;"><img src="images/book.png" style="width:16px; height:16px; margin-right:6px; vertical-align:middle;" />Sara A. George, Viswakalyan Kotapalli, Pandilla Ramaswamy, <strong>Raju Kumar</strong>, Swarnalata Gowrishankar, Shantveer G. Uppin, Murali D. Bashyam. Novel oncogenic transcriptional targets of mutant p53 in esophageal squamous cell carcinoma. <a href="https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/jcb.30534" target="_blank"><em>Journal of Cellular Biochemistry</em>, 2024;125:e30534</a>.
</p>

<p style="text-indent: -22px; margin-left: 22px;"><img src="images/book.png" style="width:16px; height:16px; margin-right:6px; vertical-align:middle;" />A.J. Caetano, Human Cell Atlas Oral and Craniofacial Bionetwork (<strong>Raju Kumar</strong> network member), I. Sequeira, and K.M. Byrd. A Roadmap for the Human Oral and Craniofacial Cell Atlas. <a href="https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/00220345221110768" target="_blank"><em>Journal of Dental Research</em> 2022, Vol. 101(11): 1274–1288</a>.
</p>

<p style="text-indent: -22px; margin-left: 22px;"><img src="images/book.png" style="width:16px; height:16px; margin-right:6px; vertical-align:middle;" /><strong>Raju Kumar</strong>, Viswakalyan Kotapalli, Ashmala Naz, Swarnalata Gowrishankar, Satish Rao, Jonathan R Pollack, and Murali Dharan Bashyam. XPNPEP3 is a novel transcriptional target of canonical Wnt/β-catenin signaling. <a href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/29383790/" target="_blank"><em>Genes Chromosomes Cancer</em>. 2018 Jun; 57(6):304–310</a>.
</p>

<p style="text-indent: -22px; margin-left: 22px;"><img src="images/book.png" style="width:16px; height:16px; margin-right:6px; vertical-align:middle;" /><strong>Raju Kumar</strong>, Ratheesh Raman, Viswakalyan Kotapalli, Swarnalata Gowrishankar, Saumyadipta Pyne, Jonathan R. Pollack, and Murali D. Bashyam. Ca<sup>2+</sup>/nuclear factor of activated T cells signaling is enriched in early-onset rectal tumors devoid of canonical Wnt activation. <a href="https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s00109-017-1607-4" target="_blank"><em>J Mol Med (Berl)</em>. 2018 Feb; 96(2):135–146</a>.
</p>

<p style="text-indent: -22px; margin-left: 22px;"><img src="images/book.png" style="width:16px; height:16px; margin-right:6px; vertical-align:middle;" /><strong>Raju Kumar</strong> and Murali D. Bashyam. Multiple oncogenic roles of nuclear β-catenin. <a href="https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s12038-017-9710-9" target="_blank"><em>J Biosci</em>. 2017 Dec; 42(4):695–707</a>.
</p>

<h4><strong>Abstracts</strong></h4>

<p style="text-indent: -22px; margin-left: 22px;"><img src="images/book.png" style="width:16px; height:16px; margin-right:6px; vertical-align:middle;" />Hamish Miller, Patricia Garrido, Wenhao Li, <strong>Raju Kumar</strong>, Iris Gines, Nikolaos Nikolaou, Tom Potter, Maíra Bailey, Fredrik Karpe, Matthew Neville, Márta Korbonits, William Griffiths, Yuqin Wang, William Alazawi, Jeremy Tomlinson. THU-236-YI Oxysterol treatment causes indirect stellate cell activation: a potential mechanism linking steroid metabolising enzyme dysregulation with fibrosis. <a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-hepatology/vol/80/suppl/S1" target="_blank"><em>Journal of Hepatology</em> (2024) 80(Suppl 1): S578</a>.
</p>

<p style="text-indent: -22px; margin-left: 22px;"><img src="images/book.png" style="width:16px; height:16px; margin-right:6px; vertical-align:middle;" />Iris Gines Mir, <strong>Raju Kumar</strong>, Patricia Garrido, Wenhao Li, Hamish Miller, Hajar Saihi, Gillian Hood, William Alazawi. FRI-520 - B-cell activating factor in non-alcoholic steatohepatitis. <a href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/journal/journal-of-hepatology/vol/78/suppl/S1" target="_blank"><em>Journal of Hepatology</em> (2023) 78(Suppl 1): S825</a>.
</p>

<p style="text-indent: -22px; margin-left: 22px;"><img src="images/book.png" style="width:16px; height:16px; margin-right:6px; vertical-align:middle;" /><strong>Raju Kumar</strong>, Rana Ibrahim, Bassem Ben Cheikh, Emma Bailey, Hannah Cottom, Oliver Braubach, Trevor Graham, Jun Wang, Ines Sequeira. Abstract 5629: Spatial genomics and proteomics enable multimodal analyses of oral SCC clonal heterogeneity and interactions with tumor microenvironment. <a href="https://aacrjournals.org/cancerres/article/83/7_Supplement/5629/722959/Abstract-5629-Spatial-genomics-and-proteomics" target="_blank"><em>Cancer Res</em> (2023) 83(7_Suppl): 5629</a>.
</p>

<h4><strong>Preprint</strong></h4>

<p style="text-indent: -22px; margin-left: 22px;"><img src="images/book.png" style="width:16px; height:16px; margin-right:6px; vertical-align:middle;" />Ana S Almeida, Tam T T Tran, Tarini S. Ghosh, Celine Ribiere, Cathriona Foley, Lisa A Azevedo, Paola Pellanda, Werner Frei, Cara M Hueston, <strong>Raju Kumar</strong>, Burkhardt Flemer, Inês Sequeira, Micheal O’Riordain, Fergus Shanahan, Paul W. O’Toole. Fiber-associated Lachnospiraceae reduce colon tumorigenesis by modulation of the tumor-immune microenvironment. <a href="https://doi.org/10.1101/2021.02.24.432654" target="_blank"><em>bioRxiv</em> (2021)</a>. doi: https://doi.org/10.1101/2021.02.24.432654.
</p>

<h4><strong>Sequence submission</strong></h4>

<p style="text-indent: -22px; margin-left: 22px;"><img src="images/book.png" style="width:16px; height:16px; margin-right:6px; vertical-align:middle;" />Co-author in multiple SARS-CoV-2 viral genome submissions (submitted by Department of Biotechnology, Govt. of India) to the GISAID database. Accession ID: EPI_ISL_466839, EPI_ISL_466840, EPI_ISL_466841, EPI_ISL_466842, EPI_ISL_466843, EPI_ISL_466844. Contribution: RNA isolation.
</p>

:::
